channel.title: SaaSVerdict Lab Updates
channel.description: Monthly benchmark releases, pricing playbooks, methodology updates, and evidence workflow tooling.

item.title: May 2026 Benchmark Preview Published
item.description: Early May reliability trend preview across 22 platforms with delta matrix versus April baseline and release-gate checks.

item.title: Best Multilogin Alternatives Page Published
item.description: New high-intent shortlist page mapping Multilogin alternatives by risk profile, API readiness, and operating cost checks.

item.title: Antidetect Browser Pricing Playbook Released
item.description: Decision framework for monthly versus annual plans using total cost, failure overhead, and governance risk modeling.

item.title: Benchmark Release Checker Added
item.description: Free publish-gate tool to validate monthly benchmark readiness before release.

item.title: Benchmark Report Template Published
item.description: Reusable monthly benchmark release blueprint with evidence gates, YAML front-matter, and traceability checklist.

item.title: April 2026 Benchmark Baseline Released
item.description: First full monthly baseline under methodology v1.2 with evidence-level annotations and drift notes.

item.title: Methodology v1.2 Changelog Published
item.description: Public version history for scoring changes, blocker updates, and impact notes.

item.title: Evidence Pack Builder Added
item.description: Free tool for generating SOP-ready YAML evidence packages before recommendation or procurement approval.
